productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Black Casual Shoe
description: Perfect for those casual days, these ultralight synthetic leather shoes from numero uno are a great addition of comfort to your wardrobe. This range of shoes comes with a ridged and foxed heel guard and smooth foxing along the rest of the shoe, quite unlike regular shoes, adding to the comfort and style statement. Team these with jeans and tees or skirts for a cool, casual look.Upper Synthetic leather upper for durability and comfort Synthetic overlays on the forefoot for added shoe structure Stitch deatiling for enhanced shoe life and style Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Eyelets on medial side of midfoot for ventilation Branding on lateral side of shoe for style Midsole TPU midsole for durability, cushioning and lightweight comfort Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Ridged foxing along the heel and smooth foxing along the rest of the shoe for durability Outsole TPR outsole for durability Curved horizontal grooves on the forefoot and heel for superior traction and grip Shoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store shoes in direct sunlight
